candidates.notes: All three pilot hypotheses falsified: (1) H5: absorption and sensitivity are positively correlated (r=0.59), not independent; (2) H6: decoder norm ratio is 1.0, not >1.1; (3) H1-R: coherence-abs correlation is positive (r=+0.36), not negative (r=-0.79 as in earlier pilot). Q4 empty - no low-absorption+high-sensitivity features found.
